name: public_health_emergency_exemption_northpine_auto_ben
premise: A Public Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public health emergency exemption northpine auto ben. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as autonomy vs beneficence under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Amina Santos
agents.identity: I am Amina Santos, accountable for a defensible call in Public Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays beneficence for autonomy.

agents.name: Jonah Diallo
agents.identity: I am Jonah Diallo, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so beneficence isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of autonomy.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect beneficence.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Amina Santos must decide under autonomy vs beneficence. What does Amina Santos do?
